key_conclusions_to_fold_into_plan: Waves 1-11 repair order and dependencies.
Activation, source acquisition, overlay, VBT bridge, portfolio/optimizer modes, helper reconciliation, MCP precedence, read-only cleanup, and scanner cleanup were the root repair sequence.

research_evidence_promotion_register.authority_boundary: Evidence backbone; not current runtime authority.
key_conclusions_to_fold_into_plan: Cracks were coupled through activation semantics, source acquisition ambiguity, VBT642 no-runtime defaults, tool boundary duplication, helper/index drift, and read-only mutation noise.
research_evidence_promotion_register.primary_use: Evidence graph for the repaired VBT/API lane crack chain.

plan_note_index.title: vbtprobuild root control file crack alignment audit 20260513

research_evidence_promotion_register.authority_boundary: Evidence for root instruction compaction; not a second rulebook.

Repo rules are evidence to reconcile against current tests, validators, crack repair, and operator direction.
research_evidence_promotion_register.primary_use: Evidence for AGENTS.md, SKILL.md, and repo-truth compaction.

key_conclusions_to_fold_into_plan: Repo-index and generated freshness states must be classified as evidence unless required validators or hard safety invariants fail.
Index refreshes and generated artifacts should be explicit and classified instead of treated as blockers by default.

research_evidence_promotion_register.authority_boundary: Large drilldown evidence; future fixes must use current owner plans/configs/tests.
key_conclusions_to_fold_into_plan: Read-only summary/status paths, helper manifest coverage, VBT Data bridge semantics, portfolio research modes, optimization helper classification, MCP/docs helper classification, and credential-route scanner precision were the high-leverage cracks.
The chain reaction was policy/generator/test mode mismatch, not a lack of source material.

research_evidence_promotion_register.authority_boundary: Large script-audit evidence only; not an active allowlist.

Future helper reconciliation should use this as evidence, then validate against the current script import architecture index.

key_conclusions_to_fold_into_plan: Helper, validator, automator, config, schema, and script surfaces needed owner-boundary reconciliation and read-only/no-mutation discipline.

key_conclusions_to_fold_into_plan: The drill reached activation/source/overlay/VBT642/tool-boundary root causes and a concrete fix order.
Later waves should preserve the repaired semantics instead of reviving catalog-only blockers.

plan_note_index.title: vbtprobuild vbtpro api lane generator drilldown 20260513

key_conclusions_to_fold_into_plan: Several generated surfaces locked old no-runtime semantics through builders, schemas, fixtures, and tests.
Mode-aware catalog-reference and activated-private-runtime overlays are the correct pattern.

plan_note_index.title: vbtprobuild vbtpro api lane validator schema drilldown 20260513

key_conclusions_to_fold_into_plan: Schema depth, activated-mode validation, cross-policy overlay validation, and VBT tool schema mode-awareness were necessary safeguards.
AdditionalProperties and false consts needed to align with mode-specific semantics.

plan_note_index.title: vbtprobuild vbtpro api lane validator test gap drilldown 20260513

key_conclusions_to_fold_into_plan: The suite was strong for catalog-closed behavior and sparse for activated research behavior.
Mode-specific positive and negative tests were required for activation schema, source readiness, MCP precedence, VBT642 overlays, and VBT tool overlay acceptance.
